query:
SELECT 
  rating,
  indexador,
  isOutlier,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  ROUND(AVG(zspread)*10000, 0) as avg_bps,
  ROUND(MIN(zspread)*10000, 0) as min_bps,
  ROUND(MAX(zspread)*10000, 0) as max_bps
FROM spread_analysis
WHERE indexador IN ('DI SPREAD', 'DI PERCENTUAL')
GROUP BY rating, indexador, isOutlier
ORDER BY rating, indexador, isOutlier;
